sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

modules.module_title: Quality Control, Testing & Sustainability in Knitwear

questions.question: Knitwear mein kaun sa fabric structure loops ke interlocking se banta hai?

options.B: Knitted

questions.explanation: Knitted fabric loops ke interlocking se banta hai, jabki woven fabric warp aur weft yarns ke interlacing se banta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear ke liye sabse common natural fiber kaun sa hai jo warmth aur softness provide karta hai?

options.B: Cotton

questions.explanation: Cotton knitwear ke liye sabse common natural fiber hai, jo softness, breathability aur good absorbency provide karta hai.

questions.question: Synthetic fibers jaise Polyester ya Acrylic knitwear mein kis property ke liye use hote hain?

options.B: Crease resistance

questions.explanation: Synthetic fibers jaise Polyester aur Acrylic apni crease resistance, durability aur colorfastness ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo knitwear mein useful hai.

questions.question: Yarn count system kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Yarn ki fineness ya thickness

questions.explanation: Yarn count system yarn ki fineness ya thickness ko measure karta hai, jo knitting machine gauge aur fabric density choose karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Woolen knitwear ki primary advantage kya hai?

options.B: Excellent warmth aur moisture-wicking properties

questions.explanation: Wool apni excellent warmth, moisture-wicking properties aur natural elasticity ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo winter knitwear ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Blended yarns (e.g., Cotton-Polyester) knitwear mein kyun use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Single fiber ki properties ko improve karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko zyada heavy banane ke liye
options.D: Dyeing process ko complicated banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Blended yarns use hote hain taaki different fibers ki best properties combine ho sakein, jaise Cotton ki comfort aur Polyester ki durability.

questions.question: Denier kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Yarn weight per unit length

questions.explanation: Denier ek direct yarn count system hai jo fixed length ke yarn ka weight measure karta hai. Higher denier matlab thicker yarn.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'gauge' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Knitting machine mein per inch needles ki number

questions.explanation: Gauge knitting machine mein per inch needles ki number ko refer karta hai. Higher gauge matlab finer knit aur more needles per inch.

questions.question: Viscose fiber knitwear mein kis property ke liye prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Silk-like luster aur drape

questions.explanation: Viscose (Rayon) apni silk-like luster, soft drape aur good absorbency ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo knitwear ko luxurious feel deta hai.

questions.question: Spandex (Lycra) knitwear mein kyun add kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Fabric ko stiff banane ke liye
options.C: Elasticity aur shape retention ke liye

questions.explanation: Spandex apni outstanding elasticity aur recovery properties ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo knitwear ko stretch aur shape retention deta hai.

questions.question: Yarn ply kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Kitne single strands ko twist karke ek yarn banaya gaya hai

questions.explanation: Yarn ply indicate karta hai ki kitne individual strands (single yarns) ko together twist karke ek final yarn banaya gaya hai. Example: 2-ply, 3-ply.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'stitch density' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Per unit area mein stitches ki number

questions.explanation: Stitch density per unit area (e.g., per inch) mein stitches ki number ko refer karta hai, jo fabric ki compactness aur stability ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Jo fibers moisture absorb nahi karte aur jaldi dry hote hain, unhe kya kehte hain?

options.B: Hydrophobic

questions.explanation: Hydrophobic fibers moisture ko repel karte hain aur jaldi dry hote hain. Polyester, Nylon iske examples hain.

questions.question: Yarn twist per inch (TPI) knitwear fabric ki kis property ko affect karta hai?

options.B: Fabric hand, strength aur pilling resistance

questions.explanation: Yarn twist fabric ke hand (feel), strength, drapeability aur pilling resistance ko significantly affect karta hai. Higher twist generally increases strength and reduces pilling.

questions.question: Texturized yarns knitwear mein kyun use hote hain?

options.A: Fabric ko smoother banane ke liye
options.B: Bulkiness, elasticity aur warmth add karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko transparent banane ke liye
options.D: Dyeing quality reduce karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Texturized yarns ko bulkiness, elasticity, stretch aur warmth add karne ke liye banaya jaata hai, jaise Crimped ya False-twist yarns.

questions.question: Cellulosic fibers (jaise Cotton, Viscose) ki ek common disadvantage kya hai knitwear mein?

options.B: Low breathability

questions.explanation: Cellulosic fibers, especially cotton, untreated hone par wrinkling aur shrinkage ke liye prone hote hain, jabki synthetic blends in issues ko reduce karte hain.

questions.question: Knitwear ki elasticity ka primary reason kya hai?

options.B: Yarn ka color
options.C: Loops ka structure jo stretch aur recover ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Knitwear apni elasticity ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo loops ke structure ki wajah se hoti hai jo stretch aur recover ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Single jersey fabric banane ke liye kaun si knitting machine use hoti hai?

options.B: Flat knitting machine

questions.explanation: Single jersey fabric commonly circular knitting machines par banaya jaata hai, jo continuous tubular fabric produce karti hain.

questions.question: Rib knit fabric ki main feature kya hai?

options.B: High horizontal stretch aur reversible appearance

questions.explanation: Rib knit fabric mein vertical wales front aur back dono taraf dikhte hain, jisse high horizontal stretch aur reversible nature milta hai. Ye cuffs, neckbands mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Full-fashioned knitting machine kya produce karti hai?

options.B: Shaped garment panels directly with finished edges

questions.explanation: Full-fashioned knitting machine garment panels ko desired shape mein directly knit karti hai, jisse cutting waste kam hota hai aur seams ki zaroorat kam padti hai.

questions.question: Plain knit (jersey) fabric ki face side aur back side mein kya difference hota hai?

options.B: Face side mein V-shaped stitches aur back side mein horizontal loops dikhte hain
options.C: Face side mein horizontal loops aur back side mein V-shaped stitches dikhte hain
options.D: Face side rough hoti hai aur back side smooth

questions.explanation: Plain knit fabric ki face side mein vertical V-shaped stitches (wale) aur back side mein horizontal loops (course) dikhte hain.

questions.question: Interlock knit fabric ki main property kya hai?

options.B: Thick, stable, aur reversible, high recovery ke saath

questions.explanation: Interlock fabric double knit structure hai, jo thick, stable, aur reversible hota hai. Iski loops interlocked hoti hain, jisse ye curl nahi karta aur achhi recovery deta hai.

questions.question: Warp knitting aur Weft knitting mein fundamental difference kya hai?

options.A: Warp knitting mein sirf synthetic yarns use hote hain
options.B: Warp knitting mein loops vertically form hote hain, weft knitting mein horizontally
options.C: Warp knitting mein single yarn use hota hai, weft knitting mein multiple yarns
options.D: Warp knitting machines zyada slow hoti hain

questions.explanation: Warp knitting mein loops vertically form hote hain, jismein har loop ke liye alag yarn hota hai. Weft knitting mein loops horizontally form hote hain, jismein single yarn across the fabric travels karta hai.

questions.question: Knitting machine mein 'stitch length' adjust karne se fabric ki kis property par asar padta hai?

options.B: Fabric ki density, weight aur drape

questions.explanation: Stitch length adjust karne se fabric ki density, weight, drape, aur hand par seedha asar padta hai. Smaller stitch length matlab denser fabric.

questions.question: Purl knit fabric ki kya khaas baat hai?

options.B: Dono sides par horizontal 'waves' (purl stitches) dikhte hain
options.D: Ye sabse tight knit structure hai

questions.explanation: Purl knit fabric dono sides par purl stitches (horizontal waves) dikhata hai, jisse ye reversible hota hai aur iski horizontal aur vertical stretch high hoti hai.

questions.question: Jersey knit fabric ke edges curl kyun hote hain?

options.B: Single knit structure mein loops ke inherent tension ki wajah se
options.C: High quality yarn use karne se
options.D: Fabric ko galat tarike se cut karne se

questions.explanation: Single jersey fabric ke edges inherent loop tension aur structure ki asymmetry ki wajah se curl karte hain, especially cut edges.

questions.question: Knitting machine mein 'needle bed' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Needles ko hold karna aur unhe move hone dena

questions.explanation: Needle bed knitting machine ka woh part hai jo needles ko hold karta hai aur unhe knitting action ke liye forward aur backward move karne deta hai.

questions.question: Double knit fabrics single knits se kaise different hote hain?

options.B: Ye zyada stable, thicker aur less prone to curling hote hain
options.C: Ye sirf synthetic fibers se bante hain

questions.explanation: Double knit fabrics do sets of needles use karte hain, jisse wo single knits ki tulna mein zyada stable, thicker, aur edges par curl nahi karte.

questions.question: Circular knitting machine par banaya gaya fabric kis form mein hota hai?

options.B: Tubular form

questions.explanation: Circular knitting machines tubular fabric produce karti hain, jo T-shirts, leggings jaise garments ke liye suitable hota hai.

questions.question: Intarsia knitting technique ka use kya hai?

options.B: Different colored yarns se distinct, intricate patterns banana without floats

questions.explanation: Intarsia knitting mein different colored yarns se distinct blocks of color banaye jaate hain. Har color area ke liye alag yarn supply hota hai, jisse back side par koi floats nahi hote.

questions.question: 'Jacquard' knitting mein kya possible hai?

options.B: Complex multi-color patterns aur textures

questions.explanation: Jacquard knitting machine individual needles ko control karti hai, jisse complex multi-color patterns, designs aur textures fabric mein create kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Flat knitting machine ka primary advantage kya hai over circular machine for certain garments?

options.A: Higher production speed for basic fabrics
options.B: Ability to knit shaped panels and complex structures (e.g., cables, intarsia)

questions.explanation: Flat knitting machines zyada versatile hoti hain. Ye shaped panels, collars, cuffs, aur complex stitch patterns jaise cables aur intarsia banane mein capable hoti hain, jo circular machines par mushkil hai.

questions.question: Terry knit fabric ki main characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Loops on one or both sides for absorbency aur softness

questions.explanation: Terry knit fabric mein surface par loops hote hain, jo ise highly absorbent aur soft banate hain, towels aur loungewear mein commonly use hota hai.

questions.question: Cut-and-sew knitwear garments ko tubular fabric se banane par kya disadvantage ho sakti hai?

options.B: Higher yarn efficiency
options.C: Potential for spirality aur more cutting waste

questions.explanation: Tubular fabric se cut-and-sew karne par fabric ki spirality (twisting) ka issue ho sakta hai aur garment shapes ke hisab se cutting waste bhi zyada generate ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein mood board banane ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Design concept, inspiration aur aesthetic ko visually communicate karna

questions.explanation: Mood board design process ka ek crucial part hai jo design concept, inspiration, colors, textures aur overall aesthetic ko visually communicate karta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear flat sketch mein kya details include karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Front, back views, stitch details, seams aur technical callouts

questions.explanation: Knitwear flat sketch mein front, back views, stitch patterns, ribbing, seams, aur any specific technical details jaise button placement, plackets ko clearly show karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'grading' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek base size pattern ko different sizes mein scale karna

questions.explanation: Grading ek process hai jismein ek base size pattern ko proportionally larger ya smaller sizes mein scale kiya jaata hai, taaki garment different body sizes ko fit kar sake.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein 'CAD' (Computer-Aided Design) ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Designs ko quickly visualize, modify aur technical specifications create karna

questions.explanation: CAD software designers ko knitwear designs ko quickly visualize, create variations, apply colors, textures, aur detailed technical drawings banane mein help karta hai, production process ko streamline karta hai.

questions.question: Neckline ke liye kaun sa knit structure sabse zyada use hota hai jo achhi recovery deta hai?

options.B: Rib knit

questions.explanation: Rib knit apni high elasticity aur recovery ki wajah se necklines, cuffs aur waistbands ke liye ideal hota hai, jo garment ko shape aur durability deta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'full fashioning marks' kya indicate karte hain?

options.B: Garment ke shaping points jahan stitches badhaye ya ghataye gaye hain

questions.explanation: Full fashioning marks garment ke shaping points ko indicate karte hain jahan stitches ko deliberately badhaya (increased) ya ghataya (decreased) gaya hai, fabric ko desired shape dene ke liye.

questions.question: A-line silhouette knitwear design mein kya effect deta hai?

options.B: Shoulders par narrow aur hemline par wider, flattering drape

questions.explanation: A-line silhouette shoulders par narrow hota hai aur gradually hemline tak widen hota hai, jo ek flattering aur comfortable drape deta hai, especially knit dresses aur tunics mein.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein 'color blocking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Garment mein contrasting colors ke large blocks ko use karna

questions.explanation: Color blocking knitwear design mein ek popular technique hai jahan garment mein bold, contrasting colors ke distinct blocks ko combine kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Raglan sleeve knitwear mein kyun popular hai?

options.A: Ye bahut tight fit deta hai
options.B: Comfort aur movement ki freedom provide karta hai, shoulder se neckline tak extend hota hai
options.C: Ye sirf formal wear mein use hota hai
options.D: Ye fabric ko stiff banata hai

questions.explanation: Raglan sleeve shoulder seam ki jagah neckline se underarm tak diagonally extend hota hai, jo greater range of motion aur comfortable fit deta hai, casual knitwear mein common hai.

questions.question: Knitwear patterns mein 'stitch gauge' calculate karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Yarn ka color decide karne ke liye
options.B: Desired fabric dimensions aur fit achieve karne ke liye
options.C: Knitting machine ka type change karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shrink hone se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stitch gauge (stitches per inch/cm aur rows per inch/cm) calculate karna crucial hai taaki final garment ki dimensions accurate ho aur woh desired fit de.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein 'texture' kaise add kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Different stitch patterns (e.g., cables, bobbles, moss stitch) aur yarn types use karke
options.D: Sirf ek hi type ka yarn use karke

questions.explanation: Knitwear mein texture different stitch patterns (cables, bobbles, moss stitch, etc.) aur varied yarn types (bouclé, slub, brushed) use karke add kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Seamless knitwear garments ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Better comfort, reduced bulk aur minimal waste
options.C: Sirf synthetic fibers se bante hain
options.D: Production cost bahut high hoti hai

questions.explanation: Seamless knitwear garments (whole garment knitting) mein koi side seams nahi hote, jisse better comfort, reduced bulk, aur minimal cutting waste hota hai.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein 'drape' kis factor par depend karta hai?

options.B: Yarn type, stitch structure aur fabric finish

questions.explanation: Drape yarn type (fiber composition, ply), stitch structure (open vs. dense), aur fabric finishing processes (softening, weighting) par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Pattern drafting for knitwear garments mein kis measurement ka dhyaan rakhna sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Body measurements aur fabric stretch percentage
options.B: Only garment length

questions.explanation: Knitwear ke liye pattern drafting karte samay body measurements ke saath-saath fabric ki stretch percentage ka dhyaan rakhna bahut zaroori hai taaki garment sahi fit de.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'intarsia' technique ka use karne ka primary reason kya hai?

options.A: Fabric ko zyada stretchable banane ke liye
options.B: Large, distinct color blocks ya graphic patterns without extra bulk on the back side create karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko waterproof banane ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko smoother banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Intarsia technique allows for creating large, distinct areas of color in a knit fabric without carrying unused yarns across the back, preventing bulk and creating a clean finish.

questions.question: Knitwear design mein 'proportion' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf garment ka color decide karna
options.B: Garment ke different parts ke size aur placement ka balance aur harmony maintain karna
options.D: Knitting machine ka speed adjust karna

questions.explanation: Proportion knitwear design mein garment ke various elements (e.g., sleeve length, body length, neckline depth) ke beech visual balance aur harmony create karne ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'stitch manipulation' se kya achieve kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Unique textures, patterns (e.g., cables, lace) aur shaping effects create karna

questions.explanation: Stitch manipulation mein stitches ko transfer, increase, decrease, ya cross kiya jaata hai jisse complex textures, patterns jaise cables, lace, aur garment ki shaping create ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Yarn sourcing karte samay sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Yarn quality, cost aur lead time

questions.explanation: Yarn sourcing mein yarn ki quality (fiber composition, count, strength), cost, aur supplier ka lead time sabse important factors hain jo production schedule aur product quality ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: Fabric development process mein 'swatch development' ka kya role hai?

options.B: New stitch patterns, yarn combinations aur textures ko test aur approve karna

questions.explanation: Swatch development mein small fabric samples banaye jaate hain taaki new stitch patterns, yarn combinations, colors aur textures ko test aur approve kiya ja sake, production se pehle.

questions.question: Knit fabric par 'reactive dyes' kyun use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Excellent colorfastness aur bright shades ke liye, especially cellulosic fibers par
options.C: Fabric ko stiff banane ke liye
options.D: Sirf synthetic fibers ko dye karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Reactive dyes cellulosic fibers (cotton, viscose) par excellent colorfastness aur bright, vibrant shades provide karte hain, kyunki ye fiber ke saath chemical bond banate hain.

questions.question: Yarn supplier selection mein 'minimum order quantity' (MOQ) ka kya significance hai?

options.B: Ye decide karta hai ki kitna kam se kam yarn order kar sakte hain, jo small businesses ke liye crucial hai
options.C: Ye yarn ki quality decide karta hai
options.D: Ye yarn ka color decide karta hai

questions.explanation: MOQ supplier ki minimum required order quantity hai. Small businesses aur startups ke liye low MOQ wale suppliers prefer kiye jaate hain taaki inventory cost kam rahe.

questions.question: Knit fabric finishing mein 'compaction' process kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Fabric ko zyada stretchable banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric shrinkage ko control aur stability improve karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko color karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko lightweight banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Compaction process knit fabrics mein residual shrinkage ko control karta hai aur fabric ki dimensional stability ko improve karta hai, jisse washing ke baad garment ka size maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Yarn count 'Ne' (English Count) aur 'Denier' mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Ne indirect system hai (higher number = finer yarn), Denier direct system hai (higher number = coarser yarn)
options.C: Ne sirf synthetic ke liye hai, Denier sirf natural ke liye
options.D: Ne yarn ki strength batata hai, Denier color

questions.explanation: Ne (English Count) ek indirect system hai, jismein higher number finer yarn ko indicate karta hai. Denier ek direct system hai, jismein higher number coarser yarn ko indicate karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric development mein 'lab dips' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Desired color standard ke according dyeing recipe aur shade approval ke liye

questions.explanation: Lab dips small dyed fabric samples hote hain jo buyer ke approved color standard se match karne ke liye banaye jaate hain, taaki bulk production mein exact shade achieve ho.

questions.question: Costing karte samay knitwear garment mein 'yarn wastage' factor kyun include kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Yarn ko sasta banane ke liye
options.B: Cutting, knitting aur other processes mein hone wale yarn loss ko account karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko zyada stretchable banane ke liye
options.D: Supplier ko extra payment dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Yarn wastage factor costing mein include kiya jaata hai taaki cutting losses, knitting defects, sample development aur other production processes mein hone wale yarn loss ko cover kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Knit fabric finishing mein 'brushing' ya 'napping' ka kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Fabric ko smooth aur shiny banata hai
options.B: Fabric surface par fuzziness aur softness add karta hai, warmth badhata hai

questions.explanation: Brushing ya napping process fabric surface par fibers ko pull out karta hai, jisse ek soft, fuzzy surface banti hai jo warmth aur comfort badhati hai.

questions.question: Yarn ki 'strength' ko measure karne ke liye kaun sa test use hota hai?

options.B: Tenacity test

questions.explanation: Yarn ki strength ko tenacity test se measure kiya jaata hai, jo yarn ko break karne ke liye required force ko record karta hai. Higher tenacity matlab stronger yarn.

questions.question: Knitwear ke liye yarn selection mein 'twist direction' (S or Z) ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf yarn ka color decide karta hai
options.B: Fabric ke hand, drape, aur spirality par impact karta hai
options.C: Yarn ki cost ko directly affect karta hai
options.D: Knitting machine ki speed ko control karta hai

questions.explanation: Yarn twist direction (S or Z) fabric ke hand, drape, appearance, aur especially spirality (skewness) par significant impact karta hai, especially single jersey fabrics mein.

questions.question: Knit fabric dyeing mein 'package dyeing' ka kya advantage hai?

options.A: Sirf fabric roll ko dye karta hai
options.B: Yarn ko cone ya package form mein dye karta hai, jisse uniform color penetration milti hai
options.D: Knitted fabric ko print karta hai

questions.explanation: Package dyeing mein yarn ko cone ya package form mein dye kiya jaata hai, jisse uniform color penetration milti hai aur yarn dyed fabrics banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Knitwear ke liye yarn selection mein 'pilling resistance' ek important criterion kyun hai?

options.A: Ye yarn ki strength batata hai
options.B: Pilling fabric surface par fiber balls banata hai, jo garment ki appearance ko kharab karte hain
options.C: Ye yarn ki elasticity batata hai
options.D: Ye yarn ki absorbency batata hai

questions.explanation: Pilling fabric surface par small fiber balls (pills) ka formation hai, jo garment ki aesthetic appeal aur durability ko kam karta hai. Achhi pilling resistance desirable hai.

questions.question: Knit fabric finishing mein 'heat setting' kis liye kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Fabric ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Synthetic fibers mein dimensional stability aur wrinkle resistance provide karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko zyada absorbent banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Heat setting synthetic knit fabrics mein dimensional stability, wrinkle resistance aur shape retention provide karta hai, fibers ko ek specific shape mein set karke.

questions.question: Yarn ki 'fineness' ko denote karne ke liye kaun sa term use hota hai?

options.B: Twist

questions.explanation: Yarn count yarn ki fineness ya thickness ko denote karta hai, jaise Ne, Denier, Tex.

questions.question: Knit fabric mein 'anti-pilling finish' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Fabric surface par pilling formation ko reduce karna

questions.explanation: Anti-pilling finish fabric surface par loose fibers ko secure karta hai ya remove karta hai, jisse pilling formation significantly reduce hota hai.

questions.question: Yarn procurement mein 'lead time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Order place karne se lekar yarn receive hone tak ka samay

questions.explanation: Lead time woh samay hai jo order place karne se lekar raw material (yarn) factory mein receive hone tak lagta hai, production planning ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'Tech Pack' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Garment ki comprehensive technical specifications, measurements, aur construction details provide karna

questions.explanation: Tech Pack ek comprehensive document hai jo garment ki detailed technical specifications, measurements, construction methods, bill of materials, aur artwork details provide karta hai, production ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'sampling' process kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf production speed badhane ke liye
options.B: Design, fit, construction aur cost ko finalize karne se pehle evaluate karna
options.C: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Yarn ko dye karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sampling process mein prototypes banaye jaate hain taaki design, fit, construction, quality aur cost ko bulk production se pehle evaluate aur finalize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Knitwear sourcing mein 'vendor selection' ke liye kya factors consider kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Vendor ki capacity, quality standards, compliance, lead time aur pricing

questions.explanation: Vendor selection mein vendor ki production capacity, quality control system, social/environmental compliance, lead time, aur pricing jaise factors ko carefully evaluate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'critical path' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf yarn ka color decide karna
options.B: Production process ke har stage ko track karna aur deadlines manage karna

questions.explanation: Critical path management production process ke har stage ko track karta hai, timelines set karta hai, aur potential bottlenecks identify karta hai taaki production schedule meet ho sake.

questions.question: FOB (Free On Board) pricing term ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Supplier buyer ke factory tak delivery cost bear karta hai
options.B: Supplier goods ko specified port par load karne tak ki cost aur responsibility bear karta hai
options.C: Buyer saari shipping cost bear karta hai
options.D: Iska matlab goods free mein milte hain

questions.explanation: FOB (Free On Board) ek international shipping term hai jismein supplier goods ko designated port par ship ya load karne tak ki cost aur risk bear karta hai. Uske baad risk buyer ka ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'order quantity' decide karte samay kya factors consider kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Market demand, sales forecasts, minimum order quantity (MOQ) aur budget

questions.explanation: Order quantity decide karte samay market demand, sales forecasts, supplier ki MOQ, budget, aur inventory holding costs jaise factors ko consider kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'PP Sample' (Pre-Production Sample) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Final approval ke liye, jo bulk production ke liye benchmark set karta hai

questions.explanation: PP Sample woh sample hai jo bulk production se pehle final approval ke liye banaya jaata hai. Ye production ke liye ek benchmark set karta hai aur saari specifications ko confirm karta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear sourcing mein 'ethical sourcing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Suppliers ko choose karna jo fair labor practices, safe working conditions aur environmental standards follow karte hain

questions.explanation: Ethical sourcing mein aise suppliers ko choose karna shaamil hai jo fair labor practices, safe working conditions, environmental responsibility aur social compliance standards ko maintain karte hain.

questions.question: Knitwear order mein 'delivery schedule' maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf buyer ko khush rakhne ke liye
options.B: Retail launch dates, seasonal demand aur inventory management ke liye crucial hai
options.C: Fabric ko shrink hone se rokne ke liye
options.D: Yarn ki quality control ke liye

questions.explanation: Delivery schedule maintain karna retail launch dates, seasonal demand ko meet karne, aur buyer ke inventory management ke liye extremely important hai.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'Bill of Materials' (BOM) ka kya use hai?

options.B: Garment banane ke liye required saare components (yarn, labels, buttons, etc.) ki detailed list aur quantity specify karna

questions.explanation: BOM (Bill of Materials) ek detailed list hai jismein garment banane ke liye required saare raw materials, trims aur accessories ki quantity aur specifications mention hoti hain, costing aur procurement ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Knitwear export mein 'Letter of Credit' (LC) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Buyer aur seller ke beech ek payment guarantee mechanism

questions.explanation: Letter of Credit (LC) ek financial instrument hai jismein buyer ka bank seller ko payment guarantee karta hai, provided ki seller ne saare specified terms aur conditions fulfill kiye hon.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'cost sheet' kyun banayi jaati hai?

options.B: Garment ki production cost calculate karne aur selling price determine karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ki stretchability check karne ke liye
options.D: Knitting machine ka model decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cost sheet garment ki production mein hone wale saare expenses (yarn, labor, trims, overheads) ko detail karti hai, jisse final production cost aur selling price determine ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'time and motion study' ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Production efficiency improve karna aur labor costs optimize karna

questions.explanation: Time and motion study production processes ko analyze karta hai taaki inefficiencies ko identify kiya ja sake, operations ko optimize kiya ja sake, aur labor costs ko effectively manage kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'range planning' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek garment ka design karna
options.B: Ek cohesive collection develop karna jismein different styles, colors aur sizes ho

questions.explanation: Range planning mein ek cohesive collection develop ki jaati hai jo market trends, target customer aur brand identity ko reflect karti hai, jismein different styles, colors, sizes aur price points hote hain.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'trim card' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Garment mein use hone wale saare trims (buttons, labels, zippers) ke physical samples aur specifications show karna
options.C: Knitting machine ke parts list karna

questions.explanation: Trim card ek physical board hai jismein garment mein use hone wale saare trims (buttons, labels, zippers, drawstrings) ke actual samples aur unki specifications attach hoti hain, approval aur procurement ke liye.

questions.question: Knitwear merchandising mein 'buyer communication' kyun important hai?

options.B: Requirements clearly samajhne, updates provide karne aur issues resolve karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Yarn ko test karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective buyer communication clear requirements understanding, timely updates, issue resolution aur strong business relationship maintain karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Knit fabric mein 'spirality' kya hai aur isse kaise control kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Fabric ka twisting ya skewing, jise proper finishing aur compaction se control kiya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Spirality knit fabric ka twisting ya skewing hai, jo yarn twist aur stitch formation ki wajah se hota hai. Isse proper finishing processes jaise compaction aur anti-spirality treatment se control kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Knitwear garment mein 'colorfastness' test kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Garment ki softness check karne ke liye
options.B: Washing, rubbing ya light exposure ke baad color retain karne ki ability check karne ke liye
options.C: Garment ki size check karne ke liye
options.D: Garment ki weight check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Colorfastness test kiya jaata hai taaki confirm ho sake ki garment ka color washing, rubbing, light exposure ya perspiration ke baad bhi fade ya bleed nahi hoga.

questions.question: Knitwear quality control mein 'inline inspection' ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Production process ke dauran defects ko early stage mein identify aur rectify karna

questions.explanation: Inline inspection production ke dauran kiya jaata hai, jisse defects ko early stage mein identify aur correct kiya ja sake, mass production mein quality issues ko prevent kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'pilling' ko kaise measure kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pilling box ya random tumble pilling tester se, visually rating scale par

questions.explanation: Pilling ko special testing equipment (jaise Martindale, ICI pilling box ya random tumble pilling tester) par fabric ko rub karke evaluate kiya jaata hai, aur phir visually ek standard rating scale par rate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Knitwear industry mein 'sustainability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmental aur social impacts ko minimize karte hue products produce karna

questions.explanation: Sustainability ka matlab hai products ko aise tareeke se produce karna jisse environmental degradation aur social inequity kam ho, jaise eco-friendly materials, efficient processes aur fair labor practices.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'dimensional stability' test kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Fabric ka color check karne ke liye
options.B: Washing ya dry cleaning ke baad fabric ke size change (shrinkage/growth) ko determine karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ki strength check karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ki softness check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dimensional stability test kiya jaata hai taaki fabric washing ya dry cleaning ke baad kitna shrink ya grow karta hai, isse garment fit aur shape maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Knitwear quality control mein 'AQL' (Acceptable Quality Level) ka kya use hai?

options.B: Buyer aur seller ke beech agreed maximum acceptable number of defects in a sample size

questions.explanation: AQL (Acceptable Quality Level) ek statistical tool hai jo buyer aur seller ke beech agreed maximum acceptable number of defects ko specify karta hai, ek given sample size mein, taaki quality consistency maintain ho.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'water conservation' methods kya ho sakti hain?

options.B: Recycling water in dyeing, using waterless dyeing technologies

questions.explanation: Water conservation methods mein dyeing aur finishing processes mein water recycling, low-water dyeing technologies, aur efficient washing techniques ka use shaamil hai.

questions.question: Knitwear garment mein 'bursting strength' test kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Garment ka color check karne ke liye
options.B: Knit fabric ki resistance to rupture under pressure check karne ke liye
options.C: Garment ki length check karne ke liye
options.D: Garment ki softness check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bursting strength test knit fabrics ki resistance to rupture ko measure karta hai jab us par pressure apply kiya jaata hai, jo garment ki durability ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Knitwear industry mein 'OEKO-TEX Standard 100' certification kya signify karta hai?

options.A: Sirf organic cotton use kiya gaya hai
options.B: Product harmful substances se free hai aur human-ecological safety ensure karta hai

questions.explanation: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certification ensure karta hai ki textile products aur unke components (yarn, fabric, accessories) harmful substances se free hain aur human-ecological safety standards ko meet karte hain.

questions.question: Knitwear production mein 'waste reduction' kaise achieve ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: Efficient pattern making, full-fashioned knitting, aur fabric recycling se

questions.explanation: Waste reduction efficient pattern making, full-fashioned knitting (jo cutting waste ko minimize karta hai), fabric remnants ka recycling, aur excess inventory ko avoid karke achieve ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Knitwear garment mein 'seam strength' test kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Seam ka color check karne ke liye
options.B: Seams ki durability aur garment life ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Seam ki softness check karne ke liye
options.D: Seam ki length check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seam strength test kiya jaata hai taaki ensure ho sake ki garment ke seams daily wear aur tear ko withstand kar sakein aur garment ki durability achhi ho.

questions.question: Knitwear industry mein 'chemical management' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Harmful chemicals ke use ko control aur eliminate karna to protect environment aur workers

questions.explanation: Chemical management mein dyeing, printing aur finishing processes mein harmful chemicals ke identification, control aur eventual elimination shaamil hai, jo environmental aur human health ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Knitwear quality control mein 'final inspection' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Finished goods ki quality, quantity aur packaging ko shipping se pehle verify karna

questions.explanation: Final inspection (pre-shipment inspection) finished goods ki quality, quantity, packaging, aur marking ko verify karta hai, taaki ensure ho ki they meet buyer's specifications before shipping.

questions.question: Knitwear mein 'care labeling' kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Consumer ko proper washing, drying aur ironing instructions provide karna

questions.explanation: Care labeling consumer ko garment ko properly maintain karne ke liye instructions provide karta hai, jisse garment ki life aur appearance maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Knitwear manufacturing mein 'energy efficiency' kaise improve ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: Energy-efficient machinery, renewable energy sources aur optimized production schedules use karke

questions.explanation: Energy efficiency improve karne ke liye energy-efficient knitting machines, renewable energy sources (solar), aur production schedules ko optimize karna zaroori hai taaki energy consumption kam ho.
